scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix frontend && npx esbuild backend/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --outfile=api/server.js --external:@prisma/client --external:prisma --external:multer && npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf public && mv frontend/dist public
